ogTitle: Newington vs Newnes Plateau: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Newington and Newnes Plateau.
heading: Newington vs Newnes Plateau — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Newington, New South Wales and Newnes Plateau, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Newington has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Newnes Plateau (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Newington or Newnes Plateau safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Newington has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Newnes Plateau scores 44/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Newington scores 19/100 for bushfire risk. Newnes Plateau scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Newington or Newnes Plateau?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Newington has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
